outcome_record.event_name: Miami Open Quarter-Final — Jannik Sinner vs Carlos Alcaraz

prediction.pre_match_note: Miami Open QF. Hard court. Both players elite. Sinner hard court win rate marginally higher (62% vs 59%). High variance match — confidence band very wide. SMS 64 reflects genuine prediction difficulty.

calibration_flags.notes: Low confidence (SMS 64) correctly reflected genuine uncertainty. Hard court surface advantage was real but small. Tennis high-variance nature confirmed — even correct direction call had wide uncertainty band. Surface win% as primary predictor validated for elite vs elite matchups.
